name: MoMRAH — Urban Planning & Balady Municipal Permitting
name_ar: وزارة الشؤون البلدية والقروية والإسكان — التخطيط العمراني وتراخيص بلدي
standard: MoMRAH Urban Planning Regulations + Balady E-Service (issuance of building permits, occupancy certificates, demolition permits)
regulator: Ministry of Municipal, Rural Affairs and Housing (MoMRAH) — and the 17 municipal Amanahs (Riyadh / Makkah / Madinah / Jeddah / Eastern / Asir / etc.)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check submittals against MoMRAH municipal urban-planning requirements and the Balady portal building-permit workflow: zoning classification per Amanah master plan, setback compliance, FAR/built-up area ratios, parking provision per use class (residential / commercial / industrial / mixed-use), green-area minimum (Vision 2030 Quality of Life target), required attachments for Balady (architectural drawings, structural drawings, MEP, Civil Defense approval, soil report), and MoMRAH contractor classification grade gate (Grades 1-5 limit contract value eligibility).
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق وفق متطلبات وزارة الشؤون البلدية والقروية والإسكان وبوابة بلدي — التصنيف، الارتدادات، نسبة البناء، مواقف السيارات، والمرفقات المطلوبة لإصدار رخصة البناء.
